ANA (Antinuclear Antibody) Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/ana-antinuclear-antibody-test/ 
ANA (Antinuclear Antibody) Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an ANA (antinuclear antibody) test? 
An ANA test is a blood test that looks for antinuclear antibodies in your blood. Antibodies are proteins that your immune system Â makes to fight foreign substances, like viruses and bacteria. But an antinuclear antibody attacks your healthy cells instead. It's called "antinuclear" be
